status_summary: Red because budget risk, execution risk are driving the highest weighted pressure.
reasons: The project has consumed 99% of budget while delivering 76% completion.
The project has 2 critical blockers and 1 unresolved issues.
Progress trails plan by 0 points and the project is 20 days behind schedule.
recommendations: Freeze non-essential spend until delivery progress catches up with the burn rate.
Run a daily blocker and issue review until the open execution queue drops materially.
Re-baseline overdue work and assign owners for the next two milestone dates.
assumptions: Used the workbook's project summary row as the primary source of truth for current-state metrics.
Did not use the provided RAG column as an input; treated it only as an optional validation reference.
